* {{sbc|Shaped Charge}} deals {{tip|proc damage}}, and thus will not trigger {{tip|spell effects}}.
* {{sbc|Shaped Charge}} is blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* {{sbc|Sabotage}} deals damage in {{fd|0.25}}-second intervals.
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* Bastionbreaker's codename in development was ''Assassin Item''.<ref>[https://www.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/news/dev/dev-2026-season-one-gameplay-preview/ /dev: 2026 Season One Gameplay Preview]</ref>
* This item is a black powder device used by {{fi|Noxus}}.<ref>[https://xcancel.com/Kindlejack/status/1995570595610947721 Kindlejack on X:] "Bolts are Demacian silver, Bastionbreaker is Noxian utilising their vaunted black powder, Actualizer was a request for something Zilean might keep in his wizard tower."</ref>
[[File:Noxus Crest icon.png|link=Universe:Noxus|100px|center]]

|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.01]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|The Brutalizer}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{g|863}} = {{g|3200}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 22 lethality, 15 ability haste.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Shaped Charge:}} Abilities deal {{as|{{rd|30|15}} {{as|(+ {{rd|{{fd|1.5}}|{{fd|0.75}}}} per 1 lethality)}} '''bonus''' true damage}} to champions and epic monsters (45 second cooldown).
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Sabotage:}} Taking down a champion within 3 seconds of damaging them grants ''Sabotage'' for 90 seconds. While you have ''Sabotage'', your next basic attack against an epic monster or turret deals {{as|{{rd|300|240}} {{as|(+ {{rd|25|20}} per 1 lethality)}} '''bonus''' true damage}} over 3 seconds.
* Limited to 1 '''Bastionbreaker'''.
}}
